findings:
## analyst-archaeology Report — GPU Architecture in VS Code Extensions

### Internal Codebase State

#### dashboardPanel.ts (235 lines)
- `retainContextWhenHidden: true` PRESENT (line ~79) — good start.
- CRITICAL P1 BLOCKER: `_update()` does full `webview.html = this._getHtmlForWebview(...)` reassignment on every data load (line ~83). This destroys all WebGL/WebGPU contexts on every refresh. `retainContextWhenHidden` does NOT protect against programmatic HTML reassignment.
- CSP (line ~148): `script-src 'nonce-${nonce}'` only. Missing: `${webview.cspSource}` for webview bundles, `connect-src` for Ollama proxy, `worker-src blob:`, `img-src`, `font-src`.
- No webview bundle entry point. All chart code injected as inline template strings.
- `localResourceRoots`: covers `media/` and `dist/` already.
- `postMessage` listener via `onDidReceiveMessage` already wired — return path ready.

#### traceabilityRenderer.ts (~120 lines)
- Pure SVG circular layout. No physics, no WebGL, not interactive.
- BUG line ~68: `node.status === STATUS.DONE` — `STATUS` is undeclared. Runtime ReferenceError for any done-status item.
- `nodes`+`edges` JSON structure is graphology-compatible. `#traceabilityGraph` div container is in the HTML template.

#### burndownRenderer.ts (~100 lines)
- Canvas 2D only. Comment: "Chart.js alternative for now." Hand-rolled chart, no library.
- `<canvas id="burndownChart">` is present. Data model (`ideal`/`actual` arrays) is chart-library-agnostic.
- `chart.js: "^4.5.1"` declared in package.json but NEVER imported here.

#### esbuild.js (80 lines)
- Single entry: `src/extension.ts → dist/extension.js`, platform `node`, format `esm`.
- MCP server build DISABLED (`_mcpServerBuildOptions = null`).
- NO webview bundle target. Sigma.js / D3 / Chart.js cannot be tree-shaken into inline strings.
- Pattern is easily extensible to second `src/webview/index.ts → dist/webview.js` target (format: `iife`, platform: `browser`).

#### package.json (extension)
- `chart.js: "^4.5.1"` and `d3: "^7.9.0"` declared at lines 740–741. Zero imports in codebase. ~500KB dead bundle weight.
- No `sigma`, no `graphology`, no WebGPU-related libs.
- Engine `vscode: "^1.99.0"` — Chromium 132+ baseline confirmed.

#### http-server.ts (329 lines, lines 1–80 read)
- Express + `express.json({ limit: '1mb' })`, 30-sec timeout. CORS localhost-only.
- No `/v1/chat/completions`, `/v1/embeddings`, `/v1/models` Ollama proxy routes exist.
- Dynamic `import()` pattern for tool handlers — extensible for inference routes.

#### htmlHelpers.ts (confirmed)
- Line 28: `Math.random()` used in `getNonce()`. Active P0 security vulnerability.

### GPU-Ready Architecture Patterns (external research)

**Pattern 1: Separate Webview SPA Bundle**
Continue.dev (`gui/src/App.tsx`): full React SPA w/ React Router as dedicated `gui/dist/` output. Extension host serves it once. GPU libraries live in the SPA. Never inline template strings. Implication: DevSteps needs a `src/webview/index.ts → dist/webview.js` esbuild target.

**Pattern 2: Strict postMessage Protocol, HTML-set-once**
vscode-jupyter data viewer: HTML template set on panel creation only. All updates via `webview.postMessage()`. GPU contexts initialized once, updated via draw calls. Never HTML reassignment.

**Pattern 3: CSP `connect-src` From Configuration**
`connect-src` built dynamically from user-configured Ollama base URL (`devsteps.ai.ollamaBaseUrl`). Never hardcoded. Enables user-configured ports, vLLM substitution, localhost enforcement.

**Pattern 4: Out-of-Process Delegator (vscode-jupyter `DataViewerDelegator`)**
Extension host orchestrates only; all rendering/inference delegated to external processes via HTTP. Maps directly to DevSteps `gpuCapabilityManager.ts` + Ollama proxy pattern.

**Pattern 5: `navigator.gpu` Feature Detection + Canvas 2D Fallback**
All GPU-capable extensions guard WebGPU usage with `if (navigator.gpu !== undefined)`. Canvas 2D fallback for SSH/Docker/WSL2. DevSteps has `retainContextWhenHidden` — still needs the guard + fallback.

### Architectural Gap Summary
| Gap | Current State | Required State | Priority |
|-----|-----|-----|-----|
| getNonce() CSPRNG | Math.random() at htmlHelpers.ts:28 | crypto.getRandomValues() | P0 |
| HTML reassignment on update | webview.html = ... on every data load | HTML once; postMessage for updates | P1 |
| No webview bundle | Inline strings only | esbuild src/webview/index.ts → dist/webview.js | P1 |
| CSP connect-src absent | Missing | + connect-src from config | P1 |
| CSP script-src incomplete | nonce only | + ${webview.cspSource} | P1 |
| Dead deps d3 + chart.js | Declared, unused | Remove or adopt intentionally | P1 |
| STATUS.DONE bug in traceabilityRenderer | ReferenceError | Replace with string 'done' | P1 |
| No Ollama proxy routes | Absent | Add /v1/chat, /v1/embeddings to http-server | P1 |
| No gpuCapabilityManager | Absent | New file: health probe + status bar | P1 |
| No navigator.gpu guard | None | Feature detection + Canvas 2D fallback | P1 |
| MCP sampling capability | Absent | Add stub handler | P2 |
| Credential storage | No pattern | context.secrets.store() only | P2 |
recommendations: P0: Fix getNonce() in htmlHelpers.ts:28 — Math.random() to crypto.getRandomValues(new Uint8Array(16)). Standalone, <10min.
P1: Migrate dashboardPanel.ts _update() to postMessage. Set webview.html once; all data via postMessage. All GPU renderers blocked on this.
P1: Add esbuild webview target: src/webview/index.ts -> dist/webview.js, format iife, platform browser. Prerequisite for Sigma.js/Chart.js.
P1: Fix CSP: add ${webview.cspSource} to script-src; add connect-src from devsteps.ai.ollamaBaseUrl config; add worker-src blob:.
P1: Remove unused d3+chart.js deps (package.json:740-741); fix STATUS.DONE ReferenceError in traceabilityRenderer.ts:68 (use string 'done').
